question: List the name of albums that are released by aritist whose name has 'Led'
sql: SELECT T2.title FROM artists AS T1 JOIN albums AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.artist_id WHERE T1.name LIKE '%Led%'
normalized_sql: SELECT T2.title FROM artists AS T1 JOIN albums AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.artist_id WHERE T1.name LIKE '%Led%'
translated_cypher:
MATCH (t1:`store_1.artists`)<-[artist_id:`ARTIST_ID`]-(t2:`store_1.albums`)
WHERE t1.name CONTAINS 'Led'
RETURN t2.title
adapted_cypher:
MATCH (t1:`store_1.artists`)<-[artist_id:`ARTIST_ID`]-(t2:`store_1.albums`)
WHERE t1.name CONTAINS 'Led'
RETURN t2.title

question: Find the full name of employee who supported the most number of customers.
sql: SELECT T1.first_name , T1.last_name FROM employees AS T1 JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.support_rep_id GROUP BY T1.id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
normalized_sql: SELECT T1.first_name , T1.last_name FROM employees AS T1 JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.support_rep_id GROUP BY T1.id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
translated_cypher:
MATCH (t1:`store_1.employees`)<-[support_rep_id:`SUPPORT_REP_ID`]-(t2:`store_1.customers`)
WITH t1.first_name AS `T1.first_name`, t1.last_name AS `T1.last_name`, t1.id AS __group_col_0
RETURN `T1.first_name`, `T1.last_name` ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: List the name of tracks belongs to genre Rock or genre Jazz.
sql: SELECT T2.name FROM genres AS T1 JOIN tracks AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.genre_id WHERE T1.name = "Rock" OR T1.name = "Jazz"
normalized_sql: SELECT T2.name FROM genres AS T1 JOIN tracks AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.genre_id WHERE T1.name = 'Rock' OR T1.name = 'Jazz'
translated_cypher:
MATCH (t1:`store_1.genres`)<-[genre_id:`GENRE_ID`]-(t2:`store_1.tracks`)
WHERE (t1.name = 'Rock'
  OR t1.name = 'Jazz')
RETURN t2.name
adapted_cypher:
MATCH (t1:`store_1.genres`)<-[genre_id:`GENRE_ID`]-(t2:`store_1.tracks`)
WHERE (t1.name = 'Rock'
  OR t1.name = 'Jazz')
RETURN t2.name

adapted_cypher:
MATCH (t1:`college_3.Department`)<-[dno:`DNO`]-(t2:`MINOR_IN`)

WHERE (t2.product_name = 'voluptatem'
  AND t1.date_problem_reported > '1995')
RETURN t1.problem_id
